name: html-effectiveness
description: Routes agent output to single self-contained .html files based on Thariq Shihipar's html-effectiveness pattern catalog. 20 canonical patterns (triage board, status report, code review, design system, prompt tuner, etc.) with a data-driven decision tree so Claude picks the right pattern per task. Includes OTel semconv generator demo as concrete proof.

upstream.author: Thariq Shihipar (@trq212, thariq.io) — Claude Code @ Anthropic
